stage1_reason: Driver changes replace direct struct skb_frag_struct member access (frag->page.p, frag->size, frag->page_offset) with kernel-provided accessor functions (skb_frag_page, skb_frag_size, skb_frag_off) as part of network subsystem API evolution for bvec conversion.
stage2_reason: Kernel commit introduces skb_frag_off accessor, matching driver migration from direct struct member access to kernel-provided accessors (skb_frag_page, skb_frag_size, skb_frag_off). Driver commits explicitly reference using these accessors for network subsystem API evolution.
